description:
DNS + TLS + edge cache for `apoth.com`, fronting App Runner.

**Scope**
- Route 53 hosted zone for `apoth.com` (transfer or NS-delegate from current registrar). WHOIS privacy on.
- ACM certificate (us-east-1 for CloudFront use) covering `apoth.com` and `www.apoth.com`. DNS validation via Route 53.
- CloudFront distribution with:
  - Origin: App Runner service (or ALB if we migrate to ECS).
  - Behavior: pre-rendered marketing routes cached at edge; `(app)/*` and `/api/*` set to `Origin Cache-Control` + private (no cache).
  - Custom error pages for 404/500.
- HTTPS-only, HSTS preloaded.
- AWS WAF associated (managed rule sets + Stripe IP allowlist on `/api/webhooks/stripe`).

**Acceptance**
- `https://apoth.com` resolves and serves the marketing surface via CloudFront.
- `curl -I https://apoth.com` shows `Strict-Transport-Security` with `preload`.
- Marketing routes return CloudFront `Hit from cloudfront` after second load; authenticated routes return `Miss from cloudfront`.
title: Production domain: Route 53 + CloudFront + ACM
